segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Sam, have you booked your flights for next month's conference yet?

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I just did. I found a good price, actually.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Oh really? I haven't booked yet.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I found mine using flight comparison websites. They show you the best prices across different airlines.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: That's a good idea. I'll check a few of those.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I also booked an early morning flight, which was cheaper. You should check a few of those, too.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Listen to a conversation.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Hey, what did you think of the concert you went to last weekend?

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Oh, it was okay. The band didn't play my favorite songs.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Were they mostly focusing on music from their new album? Yeah, which makes sense, I guess.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I've heard they're great performers. They definitely are. That was the best part.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: And the ticket price wasn't horrible, but I don't know.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Listen to an announcement at a university gym.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Attention students. Starting next week, the gym will be open from 6 AM to 10 PM daily.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Please ensure that you wear appropriate athletic attire and footwear while using the equipment. This helps us maintain a safe and hygienic environment and prevents damage to the machinery.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Quick reminder, Saturday's International Club Political Debate on Global Aid is a must-attend for all of us. It ties directly into our readings on economically underdeveloped countries.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: After attending, you'll need to partner up with a classmate and prepare an oral presentation analyzing both sides of one of the financial issues discussed.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I will email a list of available topics on Monday morning. For more details on the assignment, please check the syllabus.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Listen to a conversation.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I just heard that the art store in the mall is going out of business.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Oh no! I get painting supplies for my senior art project there.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I know. That's why I came looking for you.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: What will you do now? Well, I have a couple of options.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I could get them online, or I can go to the store in Porterville 10 miles away.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Seems to me like you'd want to buy that kind of stuff in person.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I would. It looks like I'll be making regular trips to Porterville.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Listen to a conversation.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Did you go to the rock concert in the park yesterday afternoon?

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: I went to a gardening workshop at the university center instead.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: It's sad that I missed out on the concert, but I'm starting my own garden, and I need to know all the ins and outs of growing herbs and vegetables.

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Nice, and to be honest, you didn't miss that much. No?

segments.speaker: Speaker
segments.text: Well, I love some of the songs they played, but the acoustics in the park aren't very good, so the sound quality was rather mediocre and didn't do justice to the songs.
